scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/engine && npm run build -w packages/chat-runtime && npm run build -w packages/hypercard-runtime && npm run build -w packages/confirm-runtime && npm run build -w packages/desktop-os && npm run build -w apps/todo && npm run build -w apps/crm && npm run build -w apps/book-tracker-debug
scripts.test: npm run storybook:check && npm run deps:check && npm run test -w packages/engine && npm run test -w packages/chat-runtime && npm run test -w packages/hypercard-runtime && npm run test -w packages/desktop-os
